query: We're starting a new cloud-hosted system for an agency. Which System Security Plan applies and what control baseline do we need?
Our new public service will use a GenAI chatbot and handle Confidential data. What SSP and controls apply, and does the Gen-AI overlay stack on top?
Help us classify our system's risk and data sensitivity and produce the resulting ICT&SS control baseline before we design anything.
We're kicking off a new Singapore government project and haven't pinned down the compliance scope yet. What do we need to figure out first?
Our service is public-facing with over a million visits a year and uses a GenAI feature. Show me how the DSS profile and Gen-AI overlay stack on the base SSP.
Is our system considered High-Risk or CII, and how does that change which SSP and mandatory controls apply?
Which controls are Level 0 versus Level 1 versus Level 2 for our medium-risk cloud system, and what's mandatory with no deviation?
Given our expected traffic, does a DSS profile apply to our service, and which one — Others or High Impact?
We're running a time-boxed pilot with low-sensitivity data. Which SSP applies to a sandbox system and what's the minimal control set?
Map our system's hosting model and data classification to the right IM8 successor SSP and list the special obligations like CSA notification.
Audit our AWS IAM for least privilege, MFA on privileged accounts, dormant accounts, and access reviews.
Review this pull request for SQL injection, input validation, and session handling issues.
Set up branch protection, secret push protection, and a SAST gate in our CI pipeline.
Harden this Dockerfile — minimal base image, non-root user, and digest-pinned FROM.
Configure data residency to the Singapore region and encryption at rest and in transit for our stored government data.
Set up central log management, the required log sources, retention, and detection alerting for our system.
Plan our VAPT programme, vulnerability scanning cadence, and severity-based remediation SLAs.
Secure our RAG chatbot against prompt injection and add safeguards on user file uploads.
Make our agency application form meet WCAG 2.2 AA for contrast and keyboard navigation.
Add the Official Government Banner and register our new website on WOGAA.
